violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects at bar and kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per interview with PIC, PCS is in process. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
The condensate from the air conditioner is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown/black biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Working containers of spices are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects in bar and kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Hand sink located at the bar is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The condensate from the AC unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (brown sugar) with their bare hands. Establishment must not touch ready to eat foods with their bare hands. Brown sugar was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Food was observed stored at 64 F - 74 F on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety foods must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Per person in charge, food had been on the counter for about 40 minutes. Food was relocated to the low boy unit to cool. Food must be stored under refrigeration at all times. Establishment must discontinue storing food on the counter. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Establishment does not have adequate equipment for temperature control. Per person in charge, a prep unit has been ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink was observed at 100 ppm. Label states it should be 150-400 ppm. A new sanitizing solution was mixed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Food was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety foods must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Per person in charge, food had been out of refrigeration for about a half hour. Food was relocated to a refrigeration unit at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Establishment does not have adequate equipment for temperature control. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Employee was observed touching ready-to-eat food (corn muffins) with their bare-hands. Corn muffins were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The handwashing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Handwashing sinks must be provided with hand drying provisions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Food was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit to 85 degrees Fahrenheit stored on ice. Time/temperature control for safety foods must be stored at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Establishment must discontinue using ice. Per person in charge, food had been on ice for about 2 hours. Food was relocated to refrigerator to cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Eggs were observed stored at 71 degrees Fahrenheit on the table in the kitchen. Time/temperature control for safety foods must be stored at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Per person in charge, eggs had been out of refrigeration for 2 hours. Eggs were relocated to refrigerator to cool. Establishment must store eggs under refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink was observed at a concentration in excess of 400 ppm. Label states it should be 150-400 ppm. A new sanitizing solution was made at 200 ppm during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Establishment was observed cooling cream cheese in containers greater than 4". Food must be cooled in containers less than 4". Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Establishment does not have adequate equipment for temperature control. Establishment must get additional cold-holding equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Tomato sauce cans were observed stored outside. Contamination must be prevented during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
